attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SORCT.TRX_NUMBER AS AR_TRX_NUMBER
,SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
,SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME
,COALESCE (NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS  ADJUSTMENT_INITIATOR_PARTY_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX SORCT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCT.GLOBAL_NAME)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HEADER EOXSH
ON( SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE8 = CAST(EOXSH.SAF_ID AS VARCHAR(30))
and NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXSH.GLOBAL_NAME  )

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU
ON (EFU.USER_ID = EOXSH.CREATED_BY
AND EFU.GLOBAL_NAME  = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$HRVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
ON (NCWP.CEC_ID = EFU.USER_NAME
AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01')
